About.Name: Adam S Loepker
About.AboutText:
Hi, I am Adam Loepker. I am enjoy computer science student with an interest in software development, programming, and security. Currently, I am pursuing my undergraduate degree at Seattle Pacific University. I am dedicated to expanding my knowledge and skills in various areas of computer science, with a particular focus on Java and C programming.

I enjoy tackling challenging programming projects and I thrive in collaborative environments where I can contribute my expertise and learn from my peers.

Beyond the classroom, I sometimes engage in extracurricular activities related to computer science, including hackathons, coding competitions, and open-source contributions. I love learning!

Experience.ExperienceText: Was always in charge of the house computer. My formal training started with a LaunchCode full stack web dev certification
Experience.EducationText: Use this to add some narrative to your education section

Project1.Title: TrayMate
Project1.Desc:
This is my senior group's capstone project at Seattle Pacific University. TrayMate is a resident care facility meal order app with.

It has a GitHub repo and more details shown in screenshots.

Project2.Title: Ardino garden monitor and linux web server
Project2.Desc: As my capstone from my LaunchCode full-stack course, I developed a garden monitor using an arduino that I then hosted on a website with a local nginx server on linux.

Project3.Title: Playiong card game
Project3.Desc: This was my capstone project from my Software Engineering class at the University of Missouri St. Louis. The project was a playing card game with several levels requireing succesful compleation of the last to progress

Project4.Title: Recursive vs Iterative
Project4.Desc: This was a project in my algorithms class to test out recursion vs iterative algorithms and their time complexeties
